description: Context.dev provides APIs for web scraping, site crawling, screenshots, structured extraction, and brand/company enrichment data. It is positioned as a web context service for AI agents and developer applications.
summary: Context.dev exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `https://api.context.dev/`, a hosted MCP server at `https://context-dev.stlmcp.com`, and a `context-dev` CLI; all use the same Context.dev-issued API key.
